title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates:
Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates!
